industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Tohoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated
summary: Tohoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated, an energy service conglomerate, generates, transmits, and distributes electricity to residential customers in Japan and internationally. It operates in two segments, Electric Power Business and Construction Business. The company generates and supplies hydroelectric, thermal, geothermal, solar, and nuclear electricity. It is also involved in the construction of electrical, and telecommunication facilities and buildings; civil engineering operations; design and manufacture of electricity supply facilities; and business related to the research, survey, and analysis concerning environment preservation. Tohoku Electric Power Company, Incorporated was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.
